Package com.banuba.sdk.types

Class FullImageData.Orientation

java.lang.Object
com.banuba.sdk.types.FullImageData.Orientation
Enclosing class:
FullImageData
public static class FullImageData.Orientation extends Object
Describes various information related to image orientation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Orientation()
    A default constructor.
    Orientation(CameraOrientation cameraOrientation)
    A parametrized constructor for creating Orientation instance with camera orientation only.
    Orientation(CameraOrientation cameraOrientation, boolean requireMirroring, int faceOrientation)
    A parametrized constructor for creating Orientation instance with all requared data.

  • Constructor Details

    • Orientation

      public Orientation(CameraOrientation cameraOrientation, boolean requireMirroring, int faceOrientation)
      A parametrized constructor for creating Orientation instance with all requared data.
      Parameters:
      cameraOrientation - is an enum value of camera orientation. It is present camera orientation in degrees (@see CameraOrientation).
      requireMirroring - true to mirror during rendering
      faceOrientation - in degrees

    • Orientation

      public Orientation(CameraOrientation cameraOrientation)
      A parametrized constructor for creating Orientation instance with camera orientation only.

    • Orientation

      public Orientation()
      A default constructor.

  • Method Details

    • getCameraOrientation

      public CameraOrientation getCameraOrientation()
      Returns:
      Returns camera orientation as enum value which present camera orientation in degrees (@see CameraOrientation).

    • isRequireMirroring

      public boolean isRequireMirroring()
      Returns:
      Returns true if mirroring is requered and false in another way.

    • getFaceOrientation

      public int getFaceOrientation()
      Returns:
      Returns the face orientation in degrees.
